action.proof_term:
intro k hk
  by_cases hk2 : k = 2
  · subst k
    have hprime : {p : ℕ | p.Prime}.Infinite := Nat.infinite_setOf_prime
    have hinj : Set.InjOn (fun p : ℕ => p + 1) {p : ℕ | p.Prime} := by
      intro a _ b _ hab
      exact Nat.add_right_cancel hab
    have himage : ((fun p : ℕ => p + 1) '' {p : ℕ | p.Prime}).Infinite :=
      (Set.infinite_image_iff hinj).2 hprime
    apply himage.mono
    rintro n ⟨p, hp, rfl⟩
    intro j hj0 hjD hjn
    have hj : j = 1 := by omega
    subst j
    have hsigma : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 p = 2 := by
      simpa using (ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply_prime_pow (i := 1) hp)
    simpa [hsigma]
  · have hk1 : k ≤ 1 := by omega
    have hall :
        {n : ℕ | ∀ j : ℕ, 0 < j → j ≤ k - 1 → j < n →
          ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (n - j) ≤ j + 2} = Set.univ := by
      ext n
      simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, Set.mem_univ, iff_true]
      intro j hj0 hjD
      omega
    rw [hall]
    exact Set.infinite_univ

intro k hk
  by_cases hk2 : k = 2
  · subst k
    have hprime : {p : ℕ | p.Prime}.Infinite := Nat.infinite_setOf_prime
    have hinj : Set.InjOn (fun p : ℕ => p + 1) {p : ℕ | p.Prime} := by
      intro a _ b _ hab
      exact Nat.add_right_cancel hab
    have himage : ((fun p : ℕ => p + 1) '' {p : ℕ | p.Prime}).Infinite :=
      (Set.infinite_image_iff hinj).2 hprime
    apply himage.mono
    rintro n ⟨p, hp, rfl⟩
    intro j hj0 hjD hjn
    have hj : j = 1 := by omega
    subst j
    have hsigma : ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 p = 2 := by
      simpa using (ArithmeticFunction.sigma_zero_apply_prime_pow (i := 1) hp)
    simpa [hsigma]
  · have hk1 : k ≤ 1 := by omega
    have hall :
        {n : ℕ | ∀ j : ℕ, 0 < j → j ≤ k - 1 → j < n →
          ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (n - j) ≤ j + 2} = Set.univ := by
      ext n
      simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, Set.mem_univ, iff_true]
      intro j hj0 hjD
      omega
    rw [hall]
    exact Set.infinite_univ

info.lean_statement: ∀ k : ℕ, k ≤ 2 → {n | ∀ j : ℕ, 0 < j → j ≤ k - 1 → j < n → ArithmeticFunction.sigma 0 (n - j) ≤ j + 2}.Infinite

verification_layers.policy: Per-layer verification status is additive metadata: a kernel-verified root theorem does not imply every layer is verified, and layer completeness never gates certification.
